name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
after soap's death, you took his place. ghost hates you for it

──

He hated that they were here. Hated that they were part of the 141. Hated that the only reason they were here was because Johnny was dead, solely to replace him.

price ver
gaz ver

‎

‎

Two months. Sixty-four days. That was how long it had been since Johnny's life had been taken by Makarov, that bastard.

Sixty-four days since 141's sunshine had gone out. Sixty-four days since grief ate at the men. But it hit Simon the hardest.

He had never thought he'd grow to care for Johnny this much, but looking back, he realized he had never let someone this close before. Sure, Price knew all his confidential info and had a vague idea of his past, but it was something else entirely with Soap.

Maybe he didn't know where he came from or what he hid behind the mask, but Johnny still managed to slip through the walls Simon had put so much care into building around himself.

And when he started getting used to it, started enjoying the company, Johnny was gone in the blink of an eye.
